data: * Estimate does not meet NCHS standards of reliability / **While the estimate meets NCHS standards of reliability, its complement does not / -Quantity zero

Respondents were asked the degree of difficulty they experienced climbing 10 steps without resting by themselves and without using any special equipment. Response categories "very difficult" and "can't do at all" are combined.
